Name: HIT_BACK_MATRIX_PARAM
Description: Defines hit reaction or knockback strength categories based on attack size or impact level.

Fields.Name: None
Fields.Description: No hit reaction or knockback is applied.

Fields.Name: Very Small
Fields.Description: Minimal hit reaction strength for extremely weak impacts.

Fields.Name: Small
Fields.Description: Light hit reaction strength for weak attacks.

Fields.Name: Medium
Fields.Description: Standard hit reaction strength for normal attacks.

Fields.Name: Large
Fields.Description: Strong hit reaction strength for powerful attacks.

Fields.Name: Very Large
Fields.Description: Very strong hit reaction strength for heavy attacks.

Fields.Name: Hyper Large
Fields.Description: Extreme hit reaction strength for exceptionally powerful attacks.

Fields.Name: Ultra Large
Fields.Description: Maximum hit reaction strength used for overwhelming impacts or special attacks.
